title: EvaluateRequest
description: Wire payload sent to POST /v1-evaluate. SDKs translate their camelCase surface into this snake_case body.

action.description: Action being authorized (e.g. 'modify_patient_record'). Stable identifier, snake_case recommended.

agent.description: Identifier of the calling agent or actor (e.g. 'clinical-data-agent').

context.description: Arbitrary policy context (user, environment, resource IDs). Values MUST be JSON-serializable.

api_key.description: API key echoed in the body. Also sent as Authorization: Bearer <key>; both MUST be present for wire parity.
